summary: Phase 3 Limites Intelligentes - Complete testing of Intelligent Betting Limits module. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 tabs working (Vue d'ensemble, Numéros Bloqués, Alertes, Statut Numéros). Configuration modal, Block/Unblock functionality, Alerts acknowledgement, and Numbers status check all functional.

issues: React hydration warning: span inside tbody - cosmetic issue from Emergent visual editor, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Limits routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
RBAC permissions correctly implemented - Super Admin required for config updates and blocking
Company Admin can read config but cannot modify
Bet check correctly identifies blocked numbers and returns detailed status
Auto-block feature properly configured and can be toggled
Alerts system working with acknowledge single and acknowledge all functionality
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_limits_phase3.py - New test file for Phase 3 Intelligent Limits
seed_data_creation: Number 42 blocked for lotto_ny_midi/Midi/2026-03-28 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Intelligent Limits complete. All limits APIs working: /api/limits/config (GET/PUT), /api/limits/numbers/block (POST/DELETE), /api/limits/numbers/blocked (GET), /api/limits/check (POST), /api/limits/numbers/status (GET), /api/limits/alerts (GET), /api/limits/alerts/acknowledge (POST), /api/limits/alerts/acknowledge-all (POST), /api/limits/dashboard/stats (GET). Limits Dashboard at /super/limits shows 4 tabs. Number 42 is currently blocked for lotto_ny_midi/Midi/2026-03-28. Currency format is HTG (Gourde Haïtienne). Ready for Phase 4 (SMS Twilio).
